SUBJECT: Payroll error: 14 employees underpaid in March cycle
SUMMARY: Critical: 14 staff received incorrect pay in March 2026 cycle due to a calculation rule misapplied during onboarding. Customer escalated to CSM same day. Credits issued. Root cause: misconfigured allowance rule, not platform bug — but customer trust impacted.
